candidate_lesson: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView shows 0 confirming signals (confidence <= 65%), the 30-indicator single-pair conviction must clear 100% before that pair is tradable at full internal size.
testable_rule: if regime_confirmation.tv_signals == 0 and regime_confirmation.confidence <= 0.65 and consensus.conviction < 1.00: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # only AUDNZD (100% conv, SHORT) survives full sizing today
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
